summary: Completed the v0.1.0 pre-release audit, documented scope/findings/fixes/risks/recommendation in docs/release-audit.md, removed low-risk redundant dead-code suppressions, and hardened Cargo verification commands by prepending $HOME/.cargo/bin. Full verification passed and the worktree is clean.
acceptance_status: docs/release-audit.md exists and records audited scope, findings, fixes made, remaining risks, and release recommendation.
Module depth audit uses module, interface, seam, depth, leverage, and locality vocabulary.
Dirty/broken/dead/redundant/slop checks were performed; low-risk redundant allowances were removed and remaining risks documented.
No public CLI, daemon IPC, JSON Issue Slice, worker result schema, or runner contract changes were made.
Full verification profile passed; changes are committed and worktree is clean.

findings.description: Removed redundant dead-code suppressions from live agent interfaces while preserving behavior.
Removed redundant dead-code suppression from the worktree cleanup helper; the cleanup path uses it.
Prepended $HOME/.cargo/bin to Cargo verification commands to repair local worker shells where cargo is not on PATH.
workflow::manager.rs remains large; deeper internal locality would require a separate architectural refactor, so it is documented as a non-blocking release risk.

assumptions: Scope was limited to committed repository code and release workflow assets as required by the JSON slice.
Build outputs, runtime state, daemon worktrees, and transient .workflow/runs artifacts were excluded from the audit.
